'''Jamie Turhaya''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was the owner of [[Turhaya's Landspeeder Repair Shop]], and the sibling of [[Matt Turhaya]].

==Biography==
When Matt Turhaya bet Turhaya's Landspeeder Repair to [[Tere Metallo]] in a [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] game and lost, it seemed as if his betting had ruined Jamie's company. However, since Matt was not a full partner in the company, Metallo refused to take the company as payment, instead forcing Matt to work off his debt aboard her [[Starship/Legends|starship]], the ''[[Star Quest]]''. This allowed Jamie Turhaya to keep ownership of the company.<ref name="Passages" />
